Command-line PDF compressor tuned for scanned documents. Lossless by default; lossy image optimization with SSIM quality gates via `--aggressive`; `--recommended` preset for typical scans.

## Downloads

| Platform | File |
| --- | --- |
| Linux x86_64 | [pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz](https://github.com/moujahedkhouja/pdf-minimizer/releases/download/{VERSION}/pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz) |
| Linux arm64 | [pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz](https://github.com/moujahedkhouja/pdf-minimizer/releases/download/{VERSION}/pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu.tar.gz) |
| macOS Apple Silicon | [pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz](https://github.com/moujahedkhouja/pdf-minimizer/releases/download/{VERSION}/pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-aarch64-apple-darwin.tar.gz) |
| macOS Intel | [pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-x86_64-apple-darwin.tar.gz](https://github.com/moujahedkhouja/pdf-minimizer/releases/download/{VERSION}/pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-x86_64-apple-darwin.tar.gz) |
| Windows x86_64 | [pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip](https://github.com/moujahedkhouja/pdf-minimizer/releases/download/{VERSION}/pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.zip) |
| Windows arm64 | [pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-aarch64-pc-windows-msvc.zip](https://github.com/moujahedkhouja/pdf-minimizer/releases/download/{VERSION}/pdf-minimizer-{VERSION}-aarch64-pc-windows-msvc.zip) |

Unpack and run; no installation required. See the [README](https://github.com/moujahedkhouja/pdf-minimizer/blob/{VERSION}/README.md) and [wiki](https://github.com/moujahedkhouja/pdf-minimizer/wiki) for usage.
